title: Wynncraft Menu Panoramas Fruma Dam
description: A replacement main menu panorama for Wynncraft modpacks taken at the Fruma Dam
body:
**Wynncraft Menu Panoramas** replaces the standard Minecraft main menu background with high-quality, immersive panoramas captured from iconic locations within the Wynncraft world.

### Features
This project includes two distinct versions to customize your loading experience:
* **[The Wynncraft Corruption Portal](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynncraft-menu-panoramas-nether-portal):** A dark, atmospheric view of the gateway to the Roots of Corruption.
* **[The Fruma Dam](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynncraft-menu-panoramas-fruma-dam):** A scenic, grand view of the Citadel, Auburn Forest, and Fort Torran.

### World of Wynncraft Integration
These resource packs were designed specifically for use in the [World of Wynncraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/world-of-wynncraft) modpack. If you are looking for the ultimate Wynncraft visual experience including ray-traced lighting, infinite render distance, and overhauled menus then be sure to check out the full modpack.

### Installation
1. Download the version corresponding to your preferred location (Nether Portal or Fruma Dam).
2. Place the `.zip` file in your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Enable the pack in your in-game Resource Packs settings.
